✦   Happy Birthday, Kaju Katli   ✦

Tanuja

kaju katli  ·  tiger  ·  the girl who changed everything

scroll
✦   ✦   ✦
Some people walk into your life and sit so quietly you almost miss it. And then, one ordinary afternoon, you realise they've rearranged everything. That was her. That is still her. Every single day. Happy Birthday, Tanu. Today, the world belongs to you.
She is, simply put —

A person who shows up. For people. For temples. For every stray dog on any street. Fully. Without being asked.

She dresses simply. She speaks quietly. And somehow she is the most beautiful person in every room she enters — not because she is trying, but because she genuinely is not. That kind of beauty stays with you.

She is devoted. She is kind. She will scold you, worry about you, wish good things for you, and then tell you to sleep — all in the same breath. She is the rarest kind of person: someone whose heart is always open, even when life hasn't been easy.

∞

There is no distance too far
for this friendship.

Not Rajasthan. Not Hyderabad. Not any corner of the world I end up in. I said it once and I will keep saying it — from wherever I am, I would come. Just to sit with you. Just to be there. That is what you are worth. That is what this is.

You taught me what it looks like when someone shows up for you before you even ask. That is a rare gift. And you are that gift.

I am more glad you exist than I will ever properly say.
But on your birthday — I am trying.
🐶

She sees a dog and becomes the best version of herself.

Three dogs at home. One she cried over when she left. A husky on her wishlist.
A dream of a whole dog farm someday. The most correct priorities in the world.

🐕 Golden Retriever 🐾 Labrador 🤍 Little white one 🐺 Wants a Husky 🌾 Dog farm dreams 🦴 Every stray is safe with her
🐾🐾🐾 🐾🐾🐾
🥺

The Eyes

She cannot resist the eyes. No dog in any city has ever failed with her. None. Zero. Complete failure rate.

🫂

She Adopts Them All

Emotionally at least. She has already named the ones she hasn't met yet. I believe her completely.

🏡

The Farm

One day it will exist. Wide open land. Twelve dogs. Morning sunshine. She will be the happiest person alive.

She moved PGs and cried leaving a street dog behind. She didn't cry about the packing or the distance. She cried about the dog. That is all you need to know about her heart.

🐾   kaju, every dog on earth already loves you back   🐾

The things —

That make her,
her.

I

Faith, carried quietly

She goes to the temple the way some people breathe — naturally, without fanfare. Hanuman ji, early mornings, ISKCON when her heart needs it. She doesn't announce her devotion. She just lives it. That kind of faith is something beautiful to be around.

II

Dogs. Without exception.

She doesn't just love dogs. She lights up. Completely. Like a different kind of brightness turns on inside her. No stray is invisible to her. No puppy is passable. Every single one gets something — attention, care, the full Tanu treatment. It is one of the most genuinely good things about her.

III

Art. Music. The world she makes.

She paints. She sings. There is a whole universe she builds with her hands and her voice, and it is a warmer place than most. She doesn't just make things — she makes feeling. That is the rarest kind of creative person, and she doesn't even know it.

IV

Ragada Pani Puri — an ongoing search

She knows what she wants. She is looking for it. The city has not yet given it to her, which is an injustice of epic proportions. But Tanu bears it with more grace than it deserves. The right stall is out there. It's looking for her too.

V

She will dream a government job into existence

Not just dream — she will study for it, pray for it, worry about it at midnight, and then wake up the next morning and try again. She wants good things for her family. She wants to give. That drive in her is something to admire quietly and fully.

VI

The way she scolds — and what it really means

She says "sooja." She says "kha le." She says "gade." But every single one of those is just care wearing a grumpy coat. She is checking on you. She is looking out for you. She is loving you in the most Tanu way possible. I count every one. They are all gifts.

🐾   Since the beginning

Written with everything —

A letter. For keeps.

April 4th  ·  Her Birthday  ·  From Karela

Kaju,

I'm not very good at saying the important things out loud. So here it is — written down, where you can come back to it on any day the world tries to be unkind to you. And I need you to read every word.

You walked into my life doing your thing, being yourself — quietly, genuinely — and somehow became one of the most important people in it. Without trying. Without even knowing. That is just who you are. You land in people's lives and rearrange things for the better, and you never even notice you've done it.

You are the one who shows up.
Who checks on people before they ask.
Who carries her faith gently and her heart openly.
Who loves dogs the way most people love nothing.
Who is more beautiful than she will ever believe.
Who is stronger than every hard thing she has survived.

You are kind in a world that rewards hardness. You are soft in a way that takes actual courage. You are devoted to your family, your faith, the things and beings that matter — with a consistency that is rare and real and worth so much more than people tell you it is.

I know you carry things quietly. I know life asks more of you than it should. But I also know — the way I know very few things — that everything you are working toward, everything you are praying for, everything you are building in the small hours when no one is watching — it is going to land exactly where it should.

Happy Birthday, Tiger.
You are someone worth celebrating.
Not just today — but every ordinary Tuesday.
Every hard morning. Every answered prayer.

Kaju Katli. My favourite person to know.

From anywhere in the world I end up — one thought, one flight, one message away. Always. That was always the deal. It still is.

With every bit of love I have —Karela  ·  Your person ✦
